record.text:
💻 ついに来た！タッチスクリーン MacBook が現実に。

OLED・Dynamic Island・タッチ操作という「3つの初」を同時搭載。M5 Pro/Max チップで2027年初頭に登場か👀

Bloombergガーマン氏が報告した最新情報はこちら👇
https://www.ebisuda.net/tech/2026/06/27/macbook-oleddynamic-island3m5-promax-2027-the-touchscreen-macbook-is-real-and-it/

#TechNews #Apple
https://note.com/ebibibi/n/nbb3e675a1aef

- 記事の本質は「文字数を数える」という人間側の作業を、AIへ肩代わりさせる**発想の転換**。単なる便利機能紹介ではなく「投稿＝プリミティブ化」という切り口で抽象度を上げた
- 「スレッド分割／URLリンク化／画像圧縮／X同時投稿」を畳みかけることで、AIが裏で何をやっているかを具体で見せつつ、最後に一段抽象化して締めた
- 末尾「👇」の前に断定（「〜瞬間だ」）を置くことで、読み手の「なるほど」を一拍生んでからURLへ誘導する構成

約120文字、絵文字1個（👇）、URLなしで要件を満たしています。このまま投稿してよければ言ってください 🚀

Late Stage Capitalism.     
#AiArtCommunity #digitalart #AiArt #aidigitalart #late #capitalism #satire #remixratpack #surrealart #design #AiCommunity #AiArtChallenge #SynthArt #CreativeAi #Ai #AiArtwork #qp prompt in ALT

images.alt: A satirical graphic novel illustration interpreting late-stage capitalism. A glamorous, impeccably dressed woman sits confidently in the foreground, draped in extravagant couture, diamonds, and luxury accessories, calmly sipping champagne with an expression of smug indifference. Around her are exaggerated symbols of wealth, consumerism, and excess—designer shopping bags, expensive handbags, luxury watches, overflowing champagne buckets, decadent desserts, and opulent décor. Behind her stretches a sprawling dystopian megacity choked with smog, towering corporate skyscrapers, giant advertising billboards, surveillance drones, factories belching smoke, and crowded neighborhoods illustrating economic inequality. The composition uses irony and visual satire rather than realism, contrasting extreme luxury with societal collapse. Graphic novel style with bold, clean ink lines, sophisticated cel shading, rich textures, dramatic cinematic lighting, strong depth, dynamic perspective, high contrast, muted industrial colors punctuated by luxurious golds and reds, intricate environmental storytelling, expressive facial features, museum-quality comic illustration, square orientation.

images.alt: An extreme macro view of a biomorphic microscopic organism with pale yellow-green branching tendrils radiating outward, rounded orange nodules at several tips, and a central teal open shell structure holding a glossy purple ovoid core bordered by clustered orange bead-like growths; the subject fills the vertical frame with the central cell form angled slightly toward the viewer, surrounded by soft out-of-focus tendrils that create layered foreground and background depth against a dark blue-black environment; cool directional macro light from the upper left catches the waxy teal ridges, translucent orange beads, speckled purple surface, and fine granular texture along the branching arms, while the deeper folds and underside channels remain in dense readable shadow; photographed as a cinematic scientific macro study with a 100mm macro lens at f/3.2, sharp focus on the purple core, orange bead ring, and nearest teal rim, rapid depth falloff through the tendrils, soft circular bokeh, restrained teal, violet, ocher, orange, and black palette, soft highlight rolloff, tactile microtexture, believable organic surface tension, and physically plausible contact between membrane folds, clustered nodules, tendril branches, moisture, suspended particulate, and controlled microscopic lighting.

record.text:
Commander Luna wants me to get the information out of Jennifer, since I’m a pro at this sort of thing... but she is very... attractive to me. 

I can't do it...

#startrek #starfleet #aiart #aicommunity #TValaHayes #aicontent

I’ve never seen so much hatred in someone’s eyes.

What kind of universe is this?

They strike Jennifer. They try to break her.

She refuses to give in.

I don’t know how much longer I can stand here and watch.

#startrek #starfleet #aiart #aicommunity #TValaHayes #aicontent

🤷What can I say, I have trust issues. 
Enjoyed the ride thou 😂

record.text:
الآسيوية سيغير موازين القوى التقنية في السنوات القادمة.

شاركونا آراءكم في التعليقات 👇

#الذكاء_الاصطناعي #OpenAI #تقنية #India #GenerativeAI

Anthropic بتوسيع وجودها هي الأخرى في بنغالورو عبر تعيين قيادات سابقة من Microsoft.

السبب بسيط، الهند تمتلك قاعدة Developer base هائلة وأكثر من مليار مستخدم للإنترنت، مما يجعلها الساحة الأهم لشركات الـ Generative AI لضمان الهيمنة والنمو العالمي.

هل تعتقد أن تركيز شركات الذكاء الاصطناعي على الأسواق

سوق لشركة OpenAI بعد الولايات المتحدة.

مهمة Singh ستكون شاملة، تبدأ من زيادة الـ Consumer growth وصولا إلى الـ Enterprise adoption والتعامل مع الجهات التنظيمية والتشريعية والعمليات التشغيلية.

المنافسة هناك وصلت لمرحلة الشراسة، فبينما تتحالف OpenAI مع عمالقة مثل Reliance و Tata Group، تقوم شركة

Channel9 Is debugging an AI system fundamentally different than debugging a traditional software system?: Debugging generative AI is a whole new mindset. As Mark Russinovich explains, LLMs are probabilistic, agentic systems build on decisions, and… #GenerativeAI #AIDebugging #MachineLearning

external.description:
Debugging generative AI is a whole new mindset. As Mark Russinovich explains, LLMs are probabilistic, agentic systems build on decisions, and behavior evolves run to run. With the right guardrails and observation, non‑determinism becomes a strength.

#GenerativeAI #LLMs #AIDebugging #AgenticAI

record.text: Your conduct policies now apply to agents #Cybersecurity #AIAgents #MicrosoftPurview #DataSecurity: Keep AI agents operating under control and within your data security and compliance policies using Agent 365. Block agent access to labeled… MSFTMechanics #Cybersecurity #AIAgents #MicrosoftPurview

external.description:
Keep AI agents operating under control and within your data security and compliance policies using Agent 365. Block agent access to labeled files at runtime, stop sensitive data from leaving in agent-drafted emails, and catch agents that cross conduct lines using the same Microsoft Purview controls you already run for users. Map every risky agent action in Insider Risk Management, drill into Activity Explorer for interaction-level detail, and pull regulator-ready forensics from Purview Audit. 

Shilpa Ranganathan, Microsoft Purview Partner Group Squad Leader, shares how IT and data security teams can govern agent behavior on a single Agent 365 control plane built into the Microsoft tools already used.

► Unfamiliar with Microsoft Mechanics? 
As Microsoft's official video series for IT, you can watch and share valuable content and demos of current and upcoming tech from the people who build it at Microsoft.

• Subscribe to our YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/c/MicrosoftMechanicsSeries
• Talk with other IT Pros, join us on the Microsoft Tech Community: https://techcommunity.microsoft.com/t5/microsoft-mechanics-blog/bg-p/MicrosoftMechanicsBlog
• Watch or listen from anywhere, subscribe to our podcast: https://microsoftmechanics.libsyn.com/podcast

► Keep getting this insider knowledge, join us on social:
• Follow us on Twitter: https://twitter.com/MSFTMechanics 
• Share knowledge on LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/microsoft-mechanics/
• Enjoy us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/msftmechanics/
• Loosen up with us on TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@msftmechanics

#Cybersecurity, #AIAgents, #MicrosoftPurview, #DataSecurity

record.text:
Two independent AIs reached the same result:

Maou’s linework is not a style.
It is a cognitive architecture.

#AI #認知構造 #OS

This is why:

AI can imitate most illustrators  
→ same 2D OS

AI cannot imitate Maou  
→ different dimensionality (4D)

Just talked to an older gent today who didn't believe that ChatGPT could be wrong about medical information. He uses it all the time for all his medical and nutrition needs! 

These are the same folks who would see a study like this and still believe 100% in the veracity of AI.

external.description: The eye condition bixonimania doesn't exist, but neither bots nor some researchers caught that the content was fabricated—despite obvious clues
external.title: Scientists Invented a Disease to Test Whether A.I. Knew It Was Fake. Then, Chatbots Started Saying It Was Real

record.text:
Any talk of AI "democratizing" any industry totally ignores the working folks in creative jobs who just want to get paid, and not have their work stolen just to create companies that put them out of work. 

Stealing from artists and taking away consent is not democratizing anything.
If you use a generativeAI image for your post or news article, I immediately assume it is total BS.

Go forward: treat AI like a competent intern who needs clear instructions. Tell it exactly what you want, who it is for, and what tone to use. Your prompts are the only information it gets. Make them count.

#PromptEngineering #AIPrompts #GenerativeAI #MythBuster #FactCheck #Debunked #ChatGPT […]

external.title: Original post on streetwi.se

record.bridgyOriginalText:
Go forward: treat AI like a competent intern who needs clear instructions. Tell it exactly what you want, who it is for, and what tone to use. Your prompts are the only information it gets. Make them count.

#PromptEngineering #AIPrompts #GenerativeAI #MythBuster #FactCheck #Debunked #ChatGPT #AITools #LearnAI #TechFacts (5/5)

external.title: Original post on streetwi.se

record.text: Your 5 minute reality check: open any AI tool right now. First prompt: Write something funny about spreadsheets. See what you get. Second prompt: Write a sarcastic complaint about spreadsheet software from the perspective of an exhausted accountant who has worked 60 hours this week. Use dry […]

external.title: Original post on streetwi.se

record.bridgyOriginalText: Your 5 minute reality check: open any AI tool right now. First prompt: Write something funny about spreadsheets. See what you get. Second prompt: Write a sarcastic complaint about spreadsheet software from the perspective of an exhausted accountant who has worked 60 hours this week. Use dry humor and exaggeration. Compare the two outputs. The difference will shock you. Specificity wins every single time. (4/5)

external.title: Original post on streetwi.se

record.text: Sarcasm and humor make this worse. AI often misses jokes entirely or responds to sarcasm as literal fact. At a weekend barbecue you might sarcastically say yeah, great weather during a downpour and your friends laugh. AI would agree the weather is great. Same problem happens in prompts. If you […]

external.title: Original post on streetwi.se

record.bridgyOriginalText: Sarcasm and humor make this worse. AI often misses jokes entirely or responds to sarcasm as literal fact. At a weekend barbecue you might sarcastically say yeah, great weather during a downpour and your friends laugh. AI would agree the weather is great. Same problem happens in prompts. If you write something ironic or playful without signaling it, the AI takes you at face value and produces confused results. (3/5)

external.title: Original post on streetwi.se

external.description: If you've been paying attention to the AI world in June 2026, you've probably heard the buzz around GLM 5.2. This open-source model from Z.ai (formerly Zhipu AI) landed with a real splash, turning heads among developers, researchers, and AI enthusiasts alike. In this review, we're going to walk through everything you need to know — from what GLM 5.2 actually is, to how it performs on benchmarks, to whether it can truly compete with closed-source giants like Claude.
external.title: GLM 5.2 Review: Features, Benchmarks and AI Coding Performance

* An agent subscription gives you flexibility. You’re buying an experience layer that can often connect to multiple LLMs, allowing you to switch models as the landscape evolves.
* GitHub Copilot It’s built into VS Code, requires minimal setup, just works. That convenience is hard to beat

* An LLM subscription is different. You’re paying for direct access to a model, which you can use however you want—through your own applications, automations, workflows, and toolchains.

With your own LLM access, you can choose the best agent for the task:
    * Coding agent
    * Research agent

* Workflow automation agent
All powered by the same underlying model(s) of your choice.

Personally, I use GitHub Copilot for convenience right now because it’s seamlessly integrated into my development workflow.

value.text:
ANALYSIS: It is an unwritten rule in British politics that a new PM who takes over mid-term will soon want to call a general election to win a majority of their own.

But for Andy Burnham, doing so could backfire.

external.description: Polling indicates voters aren’t desperate for Andy Burnham to secure a fresh mandate, but don’t much like the way Labour are choosing a leader either.
external.title: Burnham’s dilemma: A free ride on Starmer’s majority, or risk an election to seek his own

record.text: Senior Trump official’s claims about UK free speech arrests rejected by No 10

external.description:
Sarah B Rogers speech at conference in London included far-right memes and conspiracy theories about ‘Da Yookay’ 

Claims by a senior official in the Trump administration that British police were making thousands of “freedom of speech” arrests have been rejected by the UK government.

Sarah B Rogers, who has become the public face of the US state department’s hostility to European liberal democracies, was accused by MPs of echoing far-right memes and conspiracy theories during a speech at an international rightwing conference in London. She also referenced the death of Henry Nowak and a recent incident in which a child was thrown into a zoo’s crocodile pit. Continue reading...
external.title: Senior Trump official’s claims about UK free speech arrests rejected by No 10

record.text:
Relying on generative AI for political campaign videos where the candidate's photorealistic avatar reads a generated script? Lazy at best, incredibly misleading at worst. I spoke with Jesse Tomas of InfoNEWS about a local example.

#kelowna #bcpoli #britishcolumbia #electionsbc #aislop #generativeai

Kicked off the day surveying Mission Creek for invasive plant species with the Greens of OC President then finished the day at a social mixer with Kelowna professionals put on by the Downtown Kelowna Association. To know what's going on in this city, it helps to be comfortable going everywhere 🗺️

embed.alt: Kelowna City Council candidate Trevor McAleese speaks into the camera selfie-style from inside a luxury hotel, then outside on the street at dusk. He is wearing a grey blazer, a black button-up shirt, and is carrying a grocery bag.
